drive_dates: ● Online Test (ON Campus) - 6 th Saturday, 11.00 AM ● Tech Round 1 (45 mins) : Date will be intimated later ● Tech Round 2 (45 mins) : Date will be intimated later ● Interviews : 11 th & 12 th September Company Profile Warner Bros. Discovery’s global technology organization sits at the intersection of tech, entertainment, and everyday utility. Our platform covers everything from search, catalog, and video transcoding, to personalization, global subscriptions, and more. As a pure tech organization, we are essential to Warner Bros. Discovery’s continued growth, building world- class products on our streaming platforms Max and discovery+.
